overall.description: A static shot from the video game Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom interior. The scene features a platform bed in the foreground and a television continuously cycling through various advertisements and animations, with a neon-lit cityscape visible through large windows in the background.

events.description: television screen transitions to display animated text advertisement
television shows corporate Trauma Team logo animation
television switches to All Foods advertisement with yellow background

agents.ego_description: stationary in the room, watching the television as it cycles through various advertisements and animations

entered.detail: low platform bed with white sheets and pillows in the foreground
large window with horizontal blinds showing city lights outside
large flat screen television displaying cycling advertisements and animations
distinctive curved ceiling with wooden slats and recessed lighting
neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape visible through the window
dark wooden dresser unit supporting the television
open book or magazine lying on the bed

segments.scene_description: A static view of a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing a platform bed in the foreground and a television on the right that continuously cycles through various advertisements, animations, and corporate logos. The room features a distinctive wooden slatted ceiling and a large window revealing a neon-lit cityscape at night, with no other movement or changes in the physical environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom that remains constant while the digital elements within the room evolve. It begins with a wide view of the interior, centering on a platform bed in the foreground beneath a distinctive wooden slatted ceiling. As the camera holds its position, the focus shifts toward a television on the right that continuously cycles through a rapid succession of corporate logos, animations, and advertisements. The scene remains anchored by the steady glow of a neon-lit cityscape visible through a large window in the background, providing a shimmering contrast to the interior. Finally, the shot concludes with the persistent flicker of the screen against the stillness of the dark, high-tech living space.
